title: NIMASA At The 16th Extraordinary Session Of MOWCA In Ghana
description: The Director General, Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency (NIMASA), Dr. Bashir Jamoh and other delegates from Nigeria and 24 other countries are participating in the General Assembly, t
html: The Director General, Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency (NIMASA), Dr. Bashir Jamoh and other delegates from Nigeria and 24 other countries are participating in the General Assembly, the 16th Extraordinary Session of the Maritime Organization for West and Central Africa (MOWCA) in Accra, Ghana.
